ddls:
CREATE TABLE "nodes" (
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each node */,
  "node_name" TEXT /* Name of the node */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the node */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the node (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical or logical location of the node */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the node was checked for issues */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last configuration update */,
  "hardware_info" TEXT /* Information about the hardware (e.g., model, serial number) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_interfaces" (
  "iface_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network interface */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the node the interface is associated with */,
  "iface_name" TEXT /* Name of the network interface */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address assigned to the interface */,
  "mac_address" TEXT /* MAC address of the interface */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the interface (e.g., up, down) */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the interface was checked for issues */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last configuration update */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interface */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("iface_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_interfaces_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "firewall_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each firewall rule */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the node the rule applies to */,
  "iface_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the network interface the rule applies to */,
  "proto" INTEGER /* Reference to the protocol specified in the rule */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rule */,
  "rule_order" INTEGER /* Position of the rule in the rule set */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment associated with the rule */,
  "source_ip" TEXT /* Source IP address for the rule */,
  "destination_ip" TEXT /* Destination IP address for the rule */,
  "source_port" TEXT /* Source port range for the rule */,
  "destination_port" TEXT /* Destination port range for the rule */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action to take (e.g., allow, deny) */,
  "enabled" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the rule is active */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the rule was checked for issues */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last configuration update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_firewall_rules_proto FOREIGN KEY ("proto") REFERENCES protocols ("proto_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_firewall_rules_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_firewall_rules_iface_id FOREIGN KEY ("iface_id") REFERENCES network_interfaces ("iface_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protocols" (
  "proto_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protocol */,
  "proto_name" TEXT /* Name of the protocol */,
  "port_range" TEXT /* Port range associated with the protocol */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the protocol */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("proto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rule_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rule change */,
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the rule that was changed */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* User who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Previous value of the changed field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the changed field */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last configuration update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rule_changes_rule_id FOREIGN KEY ("rule_id") REFERENCES firewall_rules ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rule_changes_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, engineer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last password change */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object or comma-separated list of permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rule_movements" (
  "movement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rule movement */,
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the rule that was moved */,
  "old_position" INTEGER /* Previous position of the rule in the rule set */,
  "new_position" INTEGER /* New position of the rule in the rule set */,
  "movement_date" TEXT /* Date when the rule was moved */,
  "moved_by" INTEGER /* User who moved the rule */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last configuration update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rule_movements_moved_by FOREIGN KEY ("moved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rule_movements_rule_id FOREIGN KEY ("rule_id") REFERENCES firewall_rules ("rule_id")
)
